⚙️ Setup & data
The app loads and prepares everything automatically. Use this only to force a manual refresh. 📂 Load from saved data appears when you have an offline download — it's instant and skips the network.
Your data connection. Enter it once — it's remembered.
Get one free at eodhd.com · saved on this device only.
🔑 API key saved (hidden)
⚙ Advanced settingsnews key · volume window · startup · presets ▸
Get a free key at marketaux.com to test live inline headlines in each share's Deep dive. Leave blank to keep using the free news buttons. Free tier is limited — news loads only when you open a share, and is cached.
Startup automation
Depth: by volume — more = fuller but slower.
⚡ Live load presets
This controls what gets downloaded from the API. Only the ticked types are fetched — e.g. tick just Ordinary and the app downloads all shares with all their info, but never spends time or API calls on options, bonds, etc. Your selection applies to every live load, including startup.

Share saved data with another device
Export on the device that has the data, move the file across (share, email or cloud), then Import here. Or paste copied data
Ready. Fetches history for the shares you selected and stores it on this computer.

💡 EOD data finalises after market close — a weekday evening works well.

Deeper analysis
📐 Technical indicators (MA · RSI · 52-week · OBV) compute automatically at startup for every share — they power the ⭐ Score, deep dive and charts. This button just ranks the list by them if you want that view.

Filter by price per share. Bands are tailored to ASX tiers — from sub-cent nano stocks to higher-priced shares.

Days Up in a Row clear
Consecutive days the stock closed above the previous day's close. Picking a day count auto-calculates streaks for your current results.

📊 Volume average — automatic
1-month loads instantly; filtering by volume auto-upgrades your shortlist to real 3-month.
Daily data is cached for instant reloads · clear cache · 🔄 check for updates · reset licence · versions
Volume Surge clear
How far today's volume is above its average. +100% = double the average. Choose the comparison window (1-month / 3-month / 1-year) in Setup, under the exchange selector.
Any
20%+
50%+
100%+ (2×)
200%+ (3×)
500%+ (6×)
1000%+ (11×)
📊 Volume Streak clear
Consecutive recent days volume ran above its average — sustained elevated activity, regardless of price direction.
Any
1+ day
2+
3+
4+
5+
🟢 Buying Volume Streak clear
Consecutive days where volume ran ≥50% above average AND the price held (flat-to-up, small dips allowed). Sustained heavy volume without the price falling can signal accumulation or price support. Estimate from price/volume — verify via ↗ links.
Any
1+ day
2+
3+
4+
5+
🔥 Accumulation (10-day) clear
Days in the last 10 where the price rose AND volume was ≥50% above average — counted as a running total, not consecutive. 5+ suggests persistent accumulation over a fortnight. Estimate from price/volume — verify via ↗ links.
Any
3+ of 10
4+ of 10
5+ of 10
6+ of 10
7+ of 10
Absolute Volume clear
Minimum shares traded today — filters out illiquid stocks.
Any
50k+
100k+
500k+
1M+
5M+
Or exact:
Volume Behaviour clear
EOD
BLK
⭐ Watch Score /10 clear
Show only shares scoring at least this out of 10 — the same accumulation-weighted score used by Top 20 to Watch and the ⭐ Score column (mostly days with price up AND volume up together, blended with streaks and momentum). A data summary, not advice.
Any
2+
4+ Building
6+
7+ Strong
Buying Signals clear
Select signals to filter. Use Match Mode for AND / OR logic.
ACCUM
INST
EOD
BLK
Signal Match Mode
Match Any (OR)
Match All (AND)
Announcements (5-day)
After a scan, the News 5d column estimates whether each share likely had a price-sensitive announcement in the last 5 days — 📢 Likely or 🔇 Quiet — inferred from price/volume action. This is an estimate (the live ASX feed isn't reachable here); tap 📄 Verify ↗ to open the share's real announcements page and confirm.

Micro <$50M
Small $50M–$2B
Mid $2B–$10B
Large $10B+
Security Type clear
Security types don't apply to forex or crypto — this filter is hidden for those markets.

⚠️ API key returned 401 Unauthorized.

Your key needs to be activated for the new REST API:
1. Log in → My Account → API
2. Click APINEW at top of page
3. Generate your key there — it may differ from your download key
4. Test in browser: api.eoddata.com/exchange/list?apiKey=YOUR_KEY

Welcome to Insight Trading
Multi-exchange end-of-day share screener
Select any exchange from the dropdown on the left, enter your EODData API key, then press ⚡ Load Exchange Data.

Supports ASX · NYSE · NASDAQ · LSE · TSX · SGX · Frankfurt · Euronext · Crypto · Forex and more — all from the one key.

Key returning 401? Go to eoddata.com → My Account → APINEW and generate your REST API key.
①
Load a market
Pick an exchange and load the day's data — top-left.
②
Run a report
Hit 🎯 Smart Money Scan or a preset for instant picks.
③
Refine & save
Tune filters, star shares to a watchlist, save your ⭐ My Report.
